summary: Phase 2 complete. 6 PRs merged: Phase 2a (scaffold), 2b (index.html + parser), 2c (SRS + outline), 2d (Power Automate docs), dev tooling (ESLint/Prettier/Vitest/CI). README rewritten for no-git no-ZIP locked-down laptops. ~25 council review rounds total. Learnings appended.

Phase 3 M1 merged. Corpus reframed to single-user personal reference (product-persona veto caught team framing in round 1; user chose narrower scope). Warm is default tier. Plan rev 4 on main; M2 and M3 pending as separate PRs.

override_reason: hallucinated Vue/pnpm/src/lib/ stack; files referenced in critique do not exist

summary: Added .harness/council/repo_context.md; council.py injects it as preamble to every persona prompt + Lead Architect synthesis prompt. Root-cause fix for two consecutive hallucinated council reviews (PR #8 + PR #9).

Status-block bump on active_plan.md — M2 + council-anchor marked merged, M3 in progress. Plan body unchanged (multi-PR contract). First council run with the repo-context anchor live on a mixed code + prose diff.
